channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-19T07:12Z — 1397 outages, 68,411 customers, 857 fair-weather, 11 DC-proximate
item.description: VA-DOM: 2754 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | PA-PPL: 2667 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | PA-NY: 1608 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | BGE: 1501 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER)
